description: Los Negros was a Mexican criminal organization that served as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel and later the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel. Founded in 2003 by Édgar Valdez Villarreal in Nuevo Laredo, Tamaulipas, it engaged in drug trafficking, kidnapping, and murder. After Valdez's arrest in 2010, the group collapsed.
